steps.title: Turn the facts into points
steps.content: Use selling price as $x$ and demand as $y$. The two given points are $(40,20000)$ and $(60,15000)$.

steps.title: Use linear regression
steps.content: In Desmos, enter $x_1=[40,60]$ and $y_1=[20000,15000]$, then type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=-250$ and $b=30000$, so the linear model is $$y=-250x+30000.$$

steps.title: Evaluate the target price
steps.content: At a selling price of $55$ dollars, $$y=-250(55)+30000=16250.$$ The predicted demand is $16,250$ units, which matches choice A.
